member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.MenuCategoryDto
member.summary: Categoria do cardápio com seus itens disponíveis.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.MenuCategoryDto.Items
member.summary: Itens disponíveis nesta categoria, ordenados por DisplayOrder.

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.MenuItemDto
member.summary: Item do cardápio retornado pela API.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.MenuItemDto.IsAvailable
member.summary: Indica se o item está disponível para pedido.

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto
member.summary: Representação de um pedido retornada pela API.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto.RestaurantId
member.summary: Restaurante ao qual o pedido pertence.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto.Status
member.summary: Status atual do pedido. Valores possíveis: Draft, Pending, Confirmed, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Cancelled.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto.TotalAmount
member.summary: Valor total do pedido em centavos (BRL).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto.PlacedAt
member.summary: Data/hora UTC em que o pedido foi submetido à cozinha.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: Data/hora UTC de criação do pedido (rascunho).

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderItemDto
member.summary: Item de um pedido retornado pela API.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderItemDto.Id
member.summary: Identificador único do item no pedido.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderItemDto.MenuItemName
member.summary: Nome do item no cardápio no momento do pedido.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderItemDto.UnitPrice
member.summary: Preço unitário do item no momento do pedido (BRL).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.OrderItemDto.Notes
member.summary: Observações do cliente para este item (ex: "sem cebola").

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.TableDto
member.summary: Dados da mesa resolvida a partir do QR Code.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.TableDto.RestaurantId
member.summary: Restaurante ao qual a mesa pertence.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.TableDto.Number
member.summary: Número da mesa exibido ao cliente.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Common.DTOs.TableDto.QrCodeToken
member.summary: Token único do QR Code da mesa (32 caracteres hex).

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Menu.Queries.GetMenuByRestaurant.GetMenuByRestaurantQuery
member.summary: Query to get menu by restaurant

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Menu.Queries.GetMenuItemById.GetMenuItemByIdQuery
member.summary: Query to get menu item by id

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.AddItemToOrder.AddItemToOrderCommand
member.summary: Adiciona um item ao carrinho do pedido.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.AddItemToOrder.AddItemToOrderCommand.OrderId
member.summary: ID do pedido (preenchido via rota — não enviar no body).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.AddItemToOrder.AddItemToOrderCommand.MenuItemId
member.summary: ID do item do cardápio a adicionar.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.AddItemToOrder.AddItemToOrderCommand.Notes
member.summary: Observações para o item (ex: "sem cebola", "bem passado").

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.CreateOrder.CreateOrderCommand
member.summary: Cria um novo pedido em modo rascunho (carrinho).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.CreateOrder.CreateOrderCommand.RestaurantId
member.summary: ID do restaurante onde o pedido será feito.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.CreateOrder.CreateOrderCommand.TableId
member.summary: ID da mesa associada ao pedido.

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.CreateOrder.CreateOrderCommand.CustomerId
member.summary: ID do cliente (opcional — permite rastrear pedidos por cliente).

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.UpdateOrderStatus.UpdateOrderStatusCommand
member.summary: Avança o status do pedido (uso da cozinha / gerente).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.UpdateOrderStatus.UpdateOrderStatusCommand.OrderId
member.summary: ID do pedido (preenchido via rota — não enviar no body).

member.name: P:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Commands.UpdateOrderStatus.UpdateOrderStatusCommand.NewStatus
member.summary: Novo status desejado. Transições válidas: Pending→Confirmed, Confirmed→Preparing, Preparing→Ready, Ready→Delivered, qualquer→Cancelled.

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Queries.GetActiveOrdersByRestaurant.GetActiveOrdersByRestaurantQuery
member.summary: Query to get active orders by restaurant

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Queries.GetOrderById.GetOrderByIdQuery
member.summary: Query to get an order by id

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Orders.Queries.GetOrdersByTable.GetOrdersByTableQuery
member.summary: Query to get orders by table

member.name: T:RestaurantOrders.Application.Tables.Queries.GetTableByQrCode.GetTableByQrCodeQuery
member.summary: Query to get table by QR code
